mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member(memberno, id, passwd, mname, nickname, tel, zipcode, address1, address2, mdate, birth, sex, grade, intro, manner_temp, match_cnt) VALUES(member_seq.nextval, #{id}, #{passwd}, #{mname}, #{nickname}, #{tel}, #{zipcode}, #{address1}, #{address2}, sysdate, #{birth}, #{sex}, 1, #{intro}, 0, 0)
mapper.select: SELECT memberno, id, mname, nickname, tel, zipcode, address1, mdate, grade, birth, sex, intro, manner_temp, match_cnt, latitude, longitude, location_update FROM member ORDER BY grade ASC, id ASC

SELECT memberno, id, passwd, mname, nickname, tel, zipcode, address1, address2, mdate, grade, birth, sex, intro, manner_temp, match_cnt, latitude, longitude, location_update, profile, profilesaved, thumbs, sizes FROM member WHERE memberno = #{memberno}

SELECT memberno, id, passwd, mname, nickname, tel, zipcode, address1, address2, mdate, grade, birth, sex, intro, manner_temp, match_cnt, latitude, longitude, location_update, profile, profilesaved, thumbs, sizes FROM member WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE member SET mname=#{mname}, nickname=#{nickname}, tel=#{tel}, zipcode=#{zipcode}, address1=#{address1}, address2=#{address2}, passwd=#{passwd}, birth=#{birth}, sex=#{sex}, intro=#{intro} WHERE memberno=#{memberno}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt FROM member
( UPPER(id) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{word}) || '%' OR UPPER(mname) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{word}) || '%' )
mapper.update: UPDATE member SET latitude = #{latitude}, longitude = #{longitude}, location_update = SYSDATE WHERE memberno = #{memberno}
